response.overview: Three young women form a witch pact and start a black metal band—without knowing how to sing or play instruments. Driven by rage and sisterhood, they quickly go from zero to performing on the biggest stages, including Roskilde, before even releasing an album. The film follows the band over three years, but also functions as a trial where critics and audiences judge whether the members are visionaries or witches who deserve to be burned. A story about friendship, resistance, and carving out a space for yourself in a rigidly normative world.
response.title: Hex
